title: Agent Kits – Compliance Scanner
abstract: Agent Kits – Compliance Scanner simplifies AI automation by letting you describe workflows in natural language and then executing them step by step. Ideal for teams with more ideas than hands. Boos...
abstract_zh: Agent Kits – Compliance Scanner就像给团队装上了超能力，让你用大白话描述复杂流程，然后机器人一步步执行。手不够用？这个工具帮你忙！让合规检查变成一场说走就走的旅行，轻松又愉快！
